positions.name: Opening Government
responsibilities: Set up the framework for the debate
Present the strongest case for the proposition

positions.name: Closing Government
responsibilities: Provide an extension — new arguments not made by OG
Engage with the debate so far
Cannot simply repeat what OG said
Government Whip summarizes and crystallizes the gov case

positions.name: Closing Opposition
responsibilities: Provide an extension — new arguments not made by OO
Engage with all teams in the debate
Cannot simply repeat what OO said
Opposition Whip summarizes and crystallizes the opp case

ranges.label: Outstanding
ranges.description: WUDC outround level — brilliant analysis, masterful weighing

ranges.label: Very excellent
ranges.description: Significantly above 80; would top a strong room

ranges.label: Above excellent
ranges.description: Better than typical 80, with notable strengths

ranges.label: Excellent
ranges.description: Strong analysis, clear engagement, exceptional role fulfillment

ranges.label: Above average
ranges.description: Better than 75 in clear ways but not yet excellent

ranges.label: Average
ranges.description: Engages competently with the debate; meets basic role expectations

ranges.label: Below average
ranges.description: Issues with analysis, engagement, or role fulfillment

ranges.label: Weak
ranges.description: Limited analysis, mostly assertion, poor engagement

ranges.label: Very weak
ranges.description: Major problems — irrelevant, offensive, or substantively absent
